title: megalastrum glabrum
intro: Megalastrum glabrum, also known as the Smooth Megalastrum, is a plant species belonging to the family Ophioglossaceae. It is a type of fern that is native to tropical regions of Central and South America, and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, thanks to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Megalastrum glabrum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
